title.en: Under normal circumstances, it would be difficu...

content.en:
The stone was so strong that it would be difficult for even the most perfect master to crush it.

Under normal circumstances, it would be difficult to refine this stone.

Ye Tian also tried for a long time at the beginning, but he couldn't refine this stone.

However, when Ye Tian integrated the power of a kind of Extreme Dao into this stone, this was the trend of refining.

To put it simply, the more extreme paths you master, the easier it is to refine this stone.

And Ye Tian mastered so many extreme paths, all of them were integrated into this stone.

Suddenly, this stone turned into a special energy and merged into Ye Tian's body, and then slowly merged with the replication talent.

Gradually, the talent for copying began to metamorphose.

Rumble!!!

The terrifying pain struck, making Ye Tiandu's face change slightly.

However, he was very excited because he knew that the copying talent was being promoted, and once the promotion was completed, he could copy the Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu.

He was so excited at the thought of copying to the Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu.

"With the Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowment, my potential will be terrifyingly enhanced, and it will be easy to become the perfect controller of the Void Realm in the future!" Ye Tian muttered.

Time passed slowly, and after a long time, the promotion of the copying talent was finally completed.

At this moment, Ye Tian's copying talent could finally copy the Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu.

"Copy!"

Ye Tianjiang couldn't copy it before, and the replication progress was still at 0% of the two Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu to continue to copy.

Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu - Hades!

Extreme Ancestral Fu - Time!

Soon, these two Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments were all successfully copied by Ye Tian, and then merged with Ye Tian to become his two Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments.

After obtaining these two Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments, Ye Tian carefully studied his copying talent.

It wasn't long before he became roughly acquainted with the changes in his talent for copying.

First of all, it is possible to replicate the Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu, which is the main change.

Secondly, the scope of the copy talent is much wider.

Of course, what made Ye Tian happiest was that the number of duplicate bodies had increased from three to four.

You must know that many extreme path creatures don't have a single doppelganger, and the perfect controller among the cultivators has only one will clone, and Ye Tian is terrifying, four copy bodies, if each copy body condenses a will clone, it is eight bodies.

"Originally, three replica bodies were not enough, but now that there is one more replica body, many things can be solved, even if two replica bodies are placed in the extreme deep sea, it is enough!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

After all, the body of the Origin Realm Sea can't go, and the Wudao Tower has to keep a replica body for a long time, otherwise many things can't be known in time, and if you put another one in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, this is three bodies, if there is one more body, you can prepare more.

Therefore, it is indeed too convenient for Ye Tian to have one more copy body this time.

Moreover, the copy talent also has a special ability this time - copy everything!

In other words, Ye Tian copied those special items, and even copied the Extreme Dao treasures.

However, Ye Tian can only copy one special item at present, and if he does not release the copy state, he will not be able to copy the next special item.

For example, Ye Tian copied a perfect treasure, as long as he didn't lift it, this perfect treasure would exist almost permanently and could be used normally, without the slightest difference from the real perfect treasure.

But once it is removed, the perfect treasure will turn to ashes, and you can continue to copy other special items.

Of course, the ability to copy all things is not without flaws, that is, it is impossible to improve cultivation, for example, copying an Extreme Dao Golden Fruit, which seems to be exactly the same as the Extreme Dao Golden Fruit, but if you use the copied Extreme Dao Golden Fruit to impact the Extreme Dao chain, it will be useless, and it will soon dissipate.

After all, what is copied is always copied, not the real thing.

"This ability is terrifying, it is very useful at critical moments, I don't know if I can copy the Extreme Dao Treasure now?"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He'll have to give it a try when he gets the chance.

......

The copying talent has improved, and Ye Tian is ready to impact the Extreme Dao Chain.

He bought a lot of Extreme Dao Golden Fruits in the Xuandao Trading Area, and now he can use the Extreme Golden Fruit to break the Extreme Dao chains.

"When I created a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Realm, I could sense the existence of the Extreme Chain, but I couldn't break it, now I can try to break the Extreme Chain!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, Ye Tian took out an Extreme Golden Fruit and swallowed it in one gulp.

Suddenly, the energy of the Extreme Dao Golden Fruit poured into the root of the Extreme Dao, impacting the Extreme Dao Chain.

I saw that Ye Tian used his own Extreme Dao power to carry the energy of the Extreme Dao Golden Fruit and constantly impact this first Extreme Dao chain.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian slammed again and again, and soon the energy of an Extreme Golden Fruit was consumed.

Then, Ye Tian swallowed another Extreme Dao Golden Fruit.

As the Extreme Dao Golden Fruits were consumed, the first Extreme Dao Chain finally couldn't bear it anymore and shattered directly.

The first Extreme Dao Chain broke, turning into pure Extreme Dao Origin Energy and pouring into Ye Tian's Endless Extreme Dao Ancestral Body, making the Extreme Dao Ancestral Body even stronger.

Moreover, a kind of bondage in the dark has been broken.

Ye Tian knew very well that one of the conditions for the Super Perfect Controller to lead to the Infinite Realm Perfect Controller had been broken, and in the future, as long as he cultivated to the extreme of the Super Perfect Controller, and then cultivated the Endless Extreme Dao to the Xiaocheng realm, he could attack the Infinite Realm Perfect Controller.

"In the realm of the super perfect controller, the more extreme chains you can break, the better, and breaking a pole-making chain is only the minimum requirement. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

Ordinary super-perfect controllers only want to break an Extreme Path Chain for the rest of their lives, after all, for them, a treasure like the Extreme Path Golden Fruit is too difficult to obtain.

Therefore, they have the hope of breaking an extreme chain, which is already an extremely extravagant thing, where do they want to break more extreme chains!

"My Void Sparrow body has dived into the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, and I have also obtained the Xuan Dao Order, I can participate in the Xuan Dao Trade Fair again and again, and I can buy Extreme Dao Golden Fruits, and it will be very easy for me to break more Extreme Dao chains in the future. "

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Next, Ye Tian continued to refine the Extreme Dao Golden Fruit, and after refining all the Extreme Dao Golden Fruit in his hand, he broke a total of three Extreme Dao chains.

It can be seen from this that it is very difficult to break the chain of the Extreme Dao, and there are many Extreme Golden Fruits consumed.

"The replica body on the side of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea also has to continue to condense Extreme Dao Coins, and only if there are enough Extreme Dao Coins can they trade more Extreme Dao Treasures. Fortunately, I can condense thousands of Extreme Dao Coins at one time, and the speed of obtaining Extreme Dao Coins is very fast, and my other copy bodies can cultivate, and that copy body only needs to continue to condense Extreme Dao Coins to make money!"

Ye Tian said darkly.
